events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: riding in an equipment bucket is an unauthorized, non-compliant personnel-lifting practice under OSHA 1926 Subpart O — **fail**, critical risk. Corrective action requires an approved aerial lift or engineered crane-suspended personnel platform (1926.453 / 1926.1431), not the excavator/loader bucket.
